title: LinkedIn Profile Scraper ($0.30/1k results)
description: Scrape public LinkedIn profile data including experience, education, skills, and more.

url.title: LinkedIn Profile URL
url.description: Single LinkedIn profile URL. For lower Apify costs, prefer the URLs field when scraping multiple profiles.

urls.title: LinkedIn Profile URLs
urls.description: Multiple LinkedIn profile URLs to process in one Apify run. This is the recommended option for batches because it avoids one Apify run per result.

use_cache.title: Use Cache
use_cache.description: Use cached data if available to reduce costs and speed up requests

maximum_cache_age.title: Maximum Cache Age
maximum_cache_age.description: Maximum age of cached data in seconds (default: 2592000 = 30 days). Must be at least 1 second. Only used if use_cache is enabled.
